headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day offers unprecedented discounts on Apple products. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 hit new low prices. Shoppers can find significant savings on a variety of Apple gadgets.

headline: Android 17's new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 introduces a dedicated gaming mode for foldable phones. It features a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half the screen. This aims to enhance the gaming experience on flip devices.

headline: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube Shorts adds new TikTok-like features for users. A 'clear screen' mode removes icons and text from videos. The 'thumbs-up' button is replaced with a 'heart' icon.

headline: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
summary: OpenAI is postponing the full release of GPT-5.6 at the Trump administration's request. Concerns about potential security issues prompted the delay. GPT-5.6 will initially launch as a limited preview for a small group.

headline: The LEGO Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Is on Sale for the Last Day of Prime Day
summary: The LEGO Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera is currently on sale. This deal is available for the final day of Prime Day. Grab this unique LEGO set before the sale ends.

headline: EOFY 2026: Grab the Gigabyte A16 16-inch Gaming Laptop for $600 Off
summary: The Gigabyte A16 16-inch Gaming Laptop is available with a $600 discount. This special offer is part of the EOFY 2026 sale. Don't miss out on significant savings for a powerful gaming machine.

headline: Stock Up on 6.6 Feet 240W USB Type-C Cables for Just $2.80 Each During Amazon Prime Day
summary: High-power 240W USB-C cables are on sale for $2.80 each. These 6.6-foot cables can charge devices from iPhones to MacBook Pros. The incredible Prime Day deal is perfect for all your charging needs.

headline: The Apple Watch Series 11 Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever for Amazon Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch Series 11 has reached its lowest price ever. This record-breaking deal is available during Amazon Prime Day. It's considered the best Apple Watch model for most iPhone users.

headline: King Charles reveals he paid £12.9m in tax for 2024-25
summary: King Charles paid £12.9 million in taxes for the 2024-25 period. He is the first monarch to publicly disclose his tax payments. This places him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

headline: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will not move into Buckingham Palace post-renovations. They will continue residing at Clarence House. Buckingham Palace confirmed the couple's decision.

headline: UK braced for hottest June night after 36.7C reached on warmest day of year
summary: The UK recorded 36.7C in Somerset, marking the hottest day of the year. This temperature set a new record for the warmest June day. The country is now preparing for its hottest June night.

headline: Boy, 14, charged with murder after body found in search for girl in south Wales
summary: A 14-year-old boy has been charged with murder. The charge follows the discovery of a body during a search for a missing girl. The incident occurred in south Wales.
